uiIssues.description: Link 54 (href: "https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/a-light-in-the-attic_1000/index.html") has no visible text and no aria-label.
uiIssues.impact: Screen readers read this link as "link" with no destination hint. Search engines treat anchor text as a relevance signal — an empty link passes no keyword value.
uiIssues.recommendation: Provide descriptive anchor text or an aria-label that describes the destination. Avoid generic text like "click here".

uiIssues.description: Heading level jumps from H1 to H3. Heading text: "A Light in the ..."
uiIssues.impact: Screen readers use heading structure to let users navigate the page by section. Skipping levels confuses this outline and breaks WCAG 2.1 Success Criterion 1.3.1.
uiIssues.recommendation: Change the H3 to an H2 so the outline is sequential.

uiIssues.description: This page has no <meta name="description"> tag (or the content is empty).
uiIssues.impact: Search engines often display the meta description as the snippet text in search results. Without it, Google generates its own excerpt, which may reduce click-through rate.
uiIssues.recommendation: Add <meta name="description" content="..."> inside <head> with a concise summary (ideally 150–160 characters).

formIssues.description: Form "form:nth-of-type(1)" contains no input elements at all.
formIssues.impact: A form with no inputs serves no purpose and may indicate a rendering error or missing markup. Users who interact with it will be confused or unable to complete the intended action.
formIssues.recommendation: Add the appropriate input fields, or remove the <form> element if it is no longer needed. Verify the page renders correctly in all target browsers.
